question: Comment router les taches entre modeles IA selon la complexite pour optimiser cout et qualite ?

principles.text: Utiliser un routeur task-aware pour selectionner le modele par tache : modele leger/rapide pour scaffolding/renames/documentation ; modele a raisonnement fort pour architecture/debug/security-sensitive. Les benchmarks (routeur de modeles ICLR 2025, LLMRouterBench EMNLP 2025) montrent >2x cost savings vs single-strong-model sans degradation substantielle de qualite. Le pattern mode architect+editor de l'agent demontre empiriquement +3-10pp gain sur SWE-Bench Lite en separant reasoning et execution. ATTENTION : le chiffre '75% cost reduction' cite dans les benchmarks est vs random router baseline, pas absolu.

sources.name: Ong et al. 2025 - RouteLLM: Learning to Route LLMs with Preference Data (ICLR 2025, arXiv:2406.18665)
sources.quote: significantly reduces costs by over 2 times in certain cases without compromising the quality of responses

sources.name: Aider architect/editor mode announcement (September 2024)
sources.quote: Pairing o1-preview as Architect with either Deepseek or o1-mini as Editor sets a SOTA significantly above the previous best score

sources.name: LLMRouterBench (EMNLP Findings 2025)
sources.quote: benchmark comprises over 400,000 query-model instances, 21 datasets across diverse domains, 33 open and proprietary LLMs, and 10 representative routing methods

sources.name: ISO/IEC 5338:2023 §6.2.2 Infrastructure management process et §6.2.4 Human resource management process

minus: indirectness (benchmarks generaux, pas coding-specific sauf Aider)

etd_balance.benefices: RouteLLM >2x cost reduction meme qualite, Aider architect +3-10pp quality
